info.title: VFX REST API
info.description: Clean, resource-oriented API for VFX wallet integration.

get.summary:
List Bitcoin accounts. Keys are omitted unless omitKeys=false is passed explicitly
(v1 defaults to including keys; v2 is safe-by-default).

get.summary: Get a Bitcoin account by address. Keys omitted unless omitKeys=false.

Reset Bitcoin accounts and their UTXOs (rate-limited to once per 5 minutes,
shared with the v1 endpoint via Globals.LastRanBTCReset)

All local Bitcoin transactions.
Parity note: v1's includeTokens=false branch computes a filtered list and then
discards it — every call returns all TXs. Mirrored; the parameter is accepted
for interface parity only.

post.summary:
Create a vBTC contract from a completed (v2-initiated) MPC ceremony.
Signs and broadcasts the mint transaction with the local wallet key.

get.summary: Get vBTC contract details
Get the MPC-generated BTC deposit address for a vBTC contract

Contract health: how many of the original DKG validators are still online,
and whether FROST withdrawals can currently be processed
Withdrawal history for a contract
Current withdrawal status for a contract

Ownership-transfer TX data for raw transaction building (web wallet flow).
Locator comes from the beacon upload request endpoint.
All vBTC balances for an address across contracts

vBTC balance for an address in a specific contract. Owner balance includes the
live BTC deposit-address balance (ElectrumX) plus the tokenization ledger.
List registered vBTC validators
Validator status and details

post.summary:
Initiate an MPC (FROST DKG) ceremony to generate a deposit address.
Runs in the background — poll GET ceremonies/{ceremonyId} for progress.

get.summary: Status of an ongoing or completed MPC ceremony (v2-initiated ceremonies only)

post.summary: Cancel an active MPC ceremony. Only the original owner can cancel.

Prepare an MPC ceremony for web-wallet use: probes validators and returns the
exact leader-auth messages the wallet must sign, then call execute-raw.
Execute an MPC ceremony using pre-signed leader authentication from prepare-raw

Create a vBTC contract from a pre-signed external request (signature +
timestamp + replay protection). Still signs the mint TX with the local wallet key.

Build an unsigned VBTC_V2_CONTRACT_CREATE transaction for offline signing.
Requires a completed (v2-initiated) MPC ceremony.
Submit a pre-signed VBTC_V2_CONTRACT_CREATE transaction
Transfer vBTC (signs and broadcasts with the local wallet)
Build an unsigned VBTC_V2_TRANSFER transaction for offline signing
Submit a pre-signed VBTC_V2_TRANSFER transaction
Transfer ownership of a vBTC contract to another address
Request withdrawal of vBTC to a Bitcoin address (signs with the local wallet)
Complete a withdrawal: coordinates FROST MPC signing and broadcasts the BTC transaction
Request cancellation of a failed withdrawal (creates a validator-voted cancellation record)

Cancel an active withdrawal by broadcasting a VBTC_V2_WITHDRAWAL_CANCEL
transaction signed with the local wallet (distinct from the validator-voted
cancellation record flow at withdrawals/cancel)

Request withdrawal with a pre-signed external request (signature, timestamp,
and replay protection). Saves the request without a local wallet key.
Cancel a withdrawal with pre-signed owner authorization (validator-voted)

Prepare a complete-withdrawal FROST signing session for a web wallet.
Returns the exact leader-auth messages the wallet must sign; then call complete-raw/execute.

Execute a complete-withdrawal using pre-signed leader authentication.
Returns the FROST-signed BTC transaction hex for the wallet to broadcast.
Build an unsigned VBTC_V2_WITHDRAWAL_REQUEST blockchain transaction for offline signing
Submit a pre-signed VBTC_V2_WITHDRAWAL_REQUEST transaction

Build an unsigned VBTC_V2_WITHDRAWAL_COMPLETE transaction for offline signing
(records the completion on the VFX chain after the BTC broadcast)
Submit a pre-signed VBTC_V2_WITHDRAWAL_COMPLETE transaction
Build an unsigned VBTC_V2_WITHDRAWAL_CANCEL transaction for offline signing
Submit a pre-signed VBTC_V2_WITHDRAWAL_CANCEL transaction
Shield transparent vBTC into the shielded pool (T→Z). Signs with the local wallet.
Unshield vBTC back to a transparent address (Z→T)
Shielded-to-shielded vBTC transfer (Z→Z)

post.summary: Retry a failed bridge mint for a lock

Force-retry a stuck bridge mint: reconstructs local tracking from on-chain state
if missing, checks the Base contract, then collects fresh attestations

items.$ref: #/components/schemas/System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair`2[[System.Type, System.Private.CoreLib, Version=6.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=7cec85d7bea7798e],[System.Object, System.Private.CoreLib, Version=6.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=7cec85d7bea7798e]]

evmDestination.description: EVM destination address on Base (0x + 40 hex chars) where vBTC.b mints.

evmAddress.description: 0x + 40 hex chars; null/empty clears the link.

ceremonyId.description: Ceremony ID from a completed MPC ceremony (required — run the ceremony first).

linkedContractUID.description: S3C §5: when minting a public companion, the linked S3C contract's scUID.

amount.description: Delegated withdrawal amount (BTC). Passed through if local DB doesn't have the withdrawal request.

forcePublic.description: S3C §5: set true when minting a public companion for an S3C contract.

fromAddress.description: The withdrawal requestor's VFX address (FromAddress for the completion TX).

btcTransactionHash.description: The BTC transaction hash from the FROST signing result (after wallet broadcasts to Bitcoin).

hash.description: TX hash returned by the matching build endpoint (the value the client signed).

publicKey.description: Hex-encoded secp256k1 public key of the signing account.

ReserveBlockCore.Api.Rest.Models.Request.description: Submission body for every raw-tx build/send pair (client signed the Hash offline).

requestorAddress.description: The VFX address requesting withdrawal. Any address with a vBTC balance — not just the contract owner.

features.description: May only contain Multi-Asset at this point and time.

linkedEvmAddress.description: Optional Base (EVM) address linked to this BTC account for wallet Base ETH / vBTC.b balance display.

privateKey.description: This is where a private key is stored. Do not use this to get the private key. Instead use GetKey.

getKey.description:
This will return your private key. It called the GetPrivateKey(PrivateKey, Address) method.
It will return either the private key, or the private key encrypted/decrypted depending if password is present.

lastModifiedHeight.description:
Block height at which this record was last inserted/updated. Stamped automatically by
the typed overloads in ReserveBlockCore.Extensions.StateTreiStampExtensions and used by
StateSnapshotService to diff-copy only changed records into snapshot slots.
Legacy records without the field deserialize as 0 (always older than any snapshot).

ReserveBlockCore.Models.ConsensusCertifi.description: Caster quorum attestation bundle (embedded on Block; excluded from block hash — CONSENSUS_DECENTRALIZATION_PLAN).

ReserveBlockCore.Models.Privacy.Consolid.description: Merges the two smallest unspent vBTC notes into one via Z→Z to the same `zfx_` address.
Merges the two smallest unspent VFX notes into one via Z→Z to the same `zfx_` address (repeat to fold more dust).

ReserveBlockCore.Models.Privacy.CreateSh.description: Create a shielded address from a single transparent account (no HD wallet required).

useLocalHdWallet.description: When true, uses ReserveBlockCore.Models.HDWallet seed from local DB (must exist).

ReserveBlockCore.Models.Privacy.ResyncSh.description: Wipes cached vBTC notes/balances for a specific contract and rescans from FromHeight.
Wipes cached notes/balances and rescans from FromHeight to rebuild. Fixes corrupted balances.

privateKey.description: This is where a private key is stored. Do not use this to get the private key. Instead use GetKey.

lastModifiedHeight.description:
Block height at which this record was last inserted/updated. Stamped automatically by
the typed overloads in ReserveBlockCore.Extensions.StateTreiStampExtensions and used by
StateSnapshotService to diff-copy only changed records into snapshot slots.
Legacy records without the field deserialize as 0 (always older than any snapshot).

shieldedStateRoot.description: Hash of `DB_Privacy` shielded pool state after the block (see M:ReserveBlockCore.Privacy.ShieldedStateRoot.Compute).
